topStories.title: Woman sues OpenAI, says ChatGPT fuelled ex-boyfriend’s stalking behaviour after breakup
topStories.description: A US lawsuit alleges that ChatGPT reinforced a man’s paranoia and harassment of his ex-partner—raising fresh concerns about AI safety, accountability, and mental health risks.

dailyNews.title: Marco Rubio cancels green cards of 1979 Iran hostage crisis spokesperson Masoumeh Ebtekar's son & his family

dailyNews.title: Who is Amanda Ungaro, the woman now at the centre of Melania Trump–Epstein buzz?
dailyNews.description: A cryptic social media warning, past links to Trump’s inner circle, and claims tied to the Epstein controversy have pushed Amanda Ungaro into the spotlight.

dailyNews.description: Three elderly victims were wounded at the transit hub, and the alleged attacker is in critical condition, police said.

dailyNews.description: The festival in California was also forced to cancel a set by DJ Anyma on Friday because of strong winds.

dailyNews.title: Shashi Tharoor takes a dig at Pakistan over Shehbaz Sharif's post amid US-Iran talks, says ‘I do feel Washington gave…’
dailyNews.description: Congress MP Shashi Tharoor slammed Pakistan's PM Shehbaz Sharif for a social media post requesting a two-week extension for diplomacy in the West Asia conflict. The post's edit history revealed it was initially labeled as a draft, suggesting US involvement, according to Tharoor.

dailyNews.title: Inside Islamabad's Serena Hotel, where US-Iran talks unfold: Close to Pak 'diplomatic zone,' high security- What we know
dailyNews.description: A government security source reportedly said the Hotel also has conference rooms and an office complex that can house hundreds of guests – ideal for the US and Iran delegations which comprise over 150 people

topStories.title: Pope Leo issues latest rebuke of Iran conflict: "Enough with war!"
topStories.description: Pope Leo XIV offered his strongest condemnation yet of the war in Iran on Saturday, appearing to take multiple veiled shots at President Trump.

topStories.title: How Persian Gulf nations are reacting to the U.S. and Iran's temporary ceasefire
topStories.description: U.S. officials are meeting Iranian and Pakistani officials in Islamabad on Saturday in direct talks, the White House says. CBS News' Haley Ott has more on the global reaction to the two-week ceasefire.

topStories.title: Trump says U.S. is "clearing out" the Strait of Hormuz as U.S., Iranian officials meet in Pakistan
topStories.description: President Trump said the U.S. is "clearing out" the Strait of Hormuz on social media Saturday. Meanwhile, U.S. officials are meeting face-to-face with Iranian and Pakistani officials in Islamabad. CBS News' Taurean Small has the latest.

topStories.description: Palantir's Maven platform have reportedly been used in the U.S. military campaign in Iran.

topStories.description: U.S. President Donald Trump on Thursday warned Iran to "stop now" if it was charging tankers to transit the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Trump policies, China's biotech boom are ending Europe's pharma powerhouse era
dailyNews.description: Companies have long lamented Europe's fragmented capital markets, single-market adoption on pricing and clinical trials, and uneven reimbursement policies.

dailyNews.title: US and Iranian Negotiators Arrive in Pakistan for Peace Talks
dailyNews.description: Vice President JD Vance has arrived in Pakistan for high-stakes peace talks between the United States and Iran. The Iranians demands include the lifting of sanctions while the Trump administration is looking for multiple concessions, including the release of American detainees. NBC’s Keir Simmons reports for Saturday TODAY from Islamabad.

dailyNews.title: Inside Kristen Welker's interview with the Cuban president
dailyNews.description: In his first interview with a U.S. broadcast network, Cuban President Miguel Díaz-Canel insisted to @MeetThePress moderator Kristen Welker that he's not "stepping down," despite the Trump administration's increasing pressure on Cuba. Kristen joins "Here's the Scoop" to discuss what was happening behind the scenes during her interview.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.

dailyNews.title: Iran live updates: US-Iran-Pakistan trilateral talks ongoing, White House says
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

dailyNews.title: WATCH:  Trump says Iran doing 'very poor job' of allowing oil through Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Trump accused Iran of violating its agreement with the U.S. over the Strait of Hormuz, saying on Thursday that it was "doing a poor job" of allowing oil to pass through the waterway.

dailyNews.title: WATCH:  Young men in U.S. to be automatically registered into military draft
dailyNews.description: The U.S. plans to roll out a system by December that automatically registers young men for the military draft, a policy signed into law by President Trump last year.

dailyNews.title: WATCH:  Melania Trump declares ‘I am not Epstein’s victim’
dailyNews.description: Melania Trump forcefully denied she had any relationship with Jeffrey Epstein, saying in a White House speech, she is speaking out to defend herself against people who are smearing her "good name."

dailyNews.title: Postal Service, Under Pressure, Now Faces Trump’s Mail Ballot Order
dailyNews.description: President Trump’s executive order, which has been challenged as unconstitutional, would limit the Postal Service to sending only the ballots of voters deemed eligible.
